text:
The Great Stamp Meat (グレイトスタンプの肉, Gureito Sutanpu no Niku) is an item found in Midonite. Hunter × Hunter: Altar of Dragon Vein 

Item Description

Meat from the rare beast Great Stamp.

Plot

Altar of Dragon Vein

The Great Stamp Meat is one of the four ingredients that Gourmet Hunter Menchi requests for her sidequest, obtained after killing a Great Stamp.
